name: Ruby's Strawberry Shortcut Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 box Pillsbury Plus white cake mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and flour a 9x13 inch glass baking pan. Sprinkle marshmallows evenly on the bottom of the pan.
2. In a small bowl, combine thawed strawberries with the dry gelatin according to package instructions.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the cake mix, water, oil, and eggs until well combined. Beat for 2 minutes at high speed.
4. Pour the batter over the marshmallows in the pan. Spoon the strawberry mixture on top of the batter.
5. Bake in a preheated oven set to 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35-40 minutes. Allow cooling for 15 minutes before removing from the pan and inverting onto a serving tray. Serve with Cool Whip or vanilla ice cream.
This recipe was given to me by my step-mother-in-law and it tastes great. Make it when you're having guests because it makes a big cake.
